steps.title: Use the context
steps.content: Nature threw every conceivable obstacle in the way — meaning every kind of obstacle one could think of. The phrase emphasizes the wide range of difficulties.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Conceivable means "capable of being imagined or thought of." That's imaginable.

Persuasive, permanent, and obvious all describe other qualities — none means "able to be conceived/imagined."

That matches choice D — D is correct.
